description_long: This is a mid-calf, dark brown winter boot constructed from suede material with a plush, light beige fleece lining visible at the opening. The boot features a simple, slip-on design with no visible laces or fasteners, and a rounded toe. Prominent stitched seams run vertically along the sides and horizontally around the ankle, adding both structure and visual interest. The sole is flat and appears to be made of a durable, slightly textured rubber, suitable for urban walking. A small brand tag is visible near the top outer side, and a logo patch is sewn onto the heel at the back. The overall appearance suggests warmth and comfort, ideal for cold weather in urban environments.
description: A dark brown, mid-calf suede winter boot with a plush fleece lining, slip-on design, and visible stitched seams. Features a flat rubber sole and branded tags on the side and heel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the boot's suede texture, stitched seams, and the flat sole profile.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe and the plush fleece lining at the opening.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the brand tag near the top and the boot's overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the logo patch on the heel and the full opening of the fleece-lined interior.
attribute_logo: Rectangular patch with a bear paw print and 'Bearpaw' text on the heel; small fabric tag with 'Bearpaw' text near the top outer side, both in light color.
